basic_details.job_title: ICAR IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: IVRI Izatnagar is recruiting for 1 Senior Research Fellow position on a temporary/contractual basis.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Maximum 35 years as on the date of interview (relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women as per rules).
qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in relevant subject with 4 years / 5 years of Bachelor’s Degree OR Post-graduate degree in Basic Sciences with 3 years Bachelor’s + 2 years Master’s Degree with NET qualification and 2 years research experience.
qualification.experience: Working knowledge of computer & MS Office, proficiency in written English, good communication skills, and experience in research projects.

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates may send an advance application along with CV, passport size photograph, and copies of relevant documents to Dr. Rupasi Tiwari ([email protected]) and attend the walk-in-interview on 04.08.2026 with all original documents.
Principal Investigator Dr. Rupasi Tiwari Joint Director of Extension Education, ATIC ICAR-Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Izatnagar-243122 (Uttar Pradesh)
important_instructions: The engagement is purely temporary/contractual and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Candidates must bring all original documents for verification.

content_sections.heading: IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: ICAR-Indian Veterinary Research Institute has invited applications for one post of Senior Research Fellow (SRF) in the project “Kisan Sarathi 2.0”. Download IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IVRI Izatnagar is recruiting for 1 Senior Research Fellow position on a temporary/contractual basis.

rows.indian_veterinary_research_institute_ivr: Kisan Sarathi 2.0: Enhancement, Operations, Maintenance and Support
Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA as per ICAR guidelines
Till March 2027 or till completion of the project
Committee Room of ATIC Building, IVRI, Izatnagar-243122 (Uttar Pradesh)

content_sections.heading: IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Master’s degree in relevant subject with 4 years / 5 years of Bachelor’s Degree OR Post-graduate degree in Basic Sciences with 3 years Bachelor’s + 2 years Master’s Degree with NET qualification and 2 years research experience.
Working knowledge of computer & MS Office, proficiency in written English, good communication skills, and experience in research projects.
Maximum 35 years as on the date of interview (relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women as per rules).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates may send an advance application along with CV, passport size photograph, and copies of relevant documents to Dr. Rupasi Tiwari ( [email protected] ) and attend the walk-in-interview on 04.08.2026 with all original documents. Principal Investigator Dr. Rupasi Tiwari Joint Director of Extension Education, ATIC ICAR-Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Izatnagar-243122 (Uttar Pradesh)

content_sections.heading: IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The engagement is purely temporary/contractual and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Candidates must bring all original documents for verification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in-interview date for IVRI Senior Research Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in-interview is scheduled for 04th August 2026 at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Senior Research Fellow at IVRI Izatnagar?
faq.answer: Emoluments are Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA as per ICAR guidelines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IVRI SRF in Kisan Sarathi Project?
faq.answer: Master’s degree in relevant subject with 4/5 years Bachelor’s OR PG in Basic Sciences with NET + 2 years research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IVRI Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years as on the date of interview (relaxation applicable).

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Send advance application by email and attend the walk-in-interview with original documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the SRF position at Indian Veterinary Research Institute?
faq.answer: Till March 2027 or till completion of the project.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior research experience required for IVRI SRF?
faq.answer: It is desirable. Experience in research projects and proficiency in English & MS Office is preferred.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in-interview venue for IVRI SRF?
faq.answer: Committee Room of ATIC Building, Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Izatnagar-243122 (Uttar Pradesh).

faq.question: Q9. Is the IVRI Senior Research Fellow position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary/contractual and co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IVRI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Refer to the walk-in-interview advertisement issued by ICAR-Indian Veterinary Research Institute.
